Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter pursues a package bomber whose ruthless methods are being used to kill the participants in his trial.
Video.title: Blow-Up

Video.summary: Hunter helps a policeman who is framed for the murder of his wife.
Video.title: Think Blue

Video.summary: A notorious New York rackateer relocates to Eastbridge during the holiday season. Tony now has to be more concerned with peace on his own turf.
Video.title: The Frame

Video.summary: After Tony arrests Stan's murderer and Ross is convicted, he and his family must take refuge
Video.title: The Iceman Cometh

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali and his team of officers pull out all stops as they try to beat the clock in a desperate search for the kidnapper of a very sick baby.
Video.title: The Sharp Pinch

Video.summary: As Tony faces a long recovery from his gunshot wounds, a cop is killed.
Video.title: Against The Wind, Part 1

Video.summary: Tony suspects foul play when a member of a commando-like squad of elite prep-school students -- perpetrators of a series of break-in thefts -- disappears.
Video.title: Dead Cadet's Society

Video.summary: Tony joins a video-dating service when he suspects one of his clients is a murderous thief. Also, Stan tries to protect Carmela from a calirvoyant's curse.
Video.title: The Heart's A Lonely Sucker

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall work to stop a brigade of suburban mercenaries plotting to break a drug dealer out of prison
Video.title: War Zone

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a student terror group in the car bombing of a Middle-Eastern consulate member.
Video.title: 62 Hrs. Of Terror

Video.summary: When a dying contract killer confesses he was paid to kill Hunter's father, Hunter pursues the true murderer.
Video.title: Scrap Metal

Video.summary: As the search for a cop killer intensifies, Tony begins to doubt his own recovery.
Video.title: Against The Wind, Part 2

Video.summary: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.
Video.title: Stoned

Video.summary: In an effort make sergeant, Stan enlists an abused wife to catch her suspected drug dealer husband.
Video.title: Sergeant Kelly

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall are given 72 hours to find an attorney who falsified his death.
Video.title: Burned

Video.summary: A teenager's death leads Hunter and McCall to a Fagin who commands a group of barrio boys to commit crimes.
Video.title: Fagin 1986

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover as film execs when a local movie crew becomes the target of militants.
Video.title: Baser Instincts

Video.summary: A rapist returns to haunt Chris for sending him to jail.
Video.title: Good Time Charlie

Video.summary: A Palm Beach society outcast is murdered as he is about to reveal something he says will rock the community. Chris and Rita go undercover to find out the secret.
Video.title: Social Call

Video.summary: Rita and Chris get involved when a wealthy over-sexed Palm Beach businessman puts out a contract on a smalltime loser who is partially responsible for the death of a woman in the businessman's well-paid harem.
Video.title: Wild Card

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the murder of a vice cop, and Chris must deal with the victim's son.
Video.title: In Too Deep

Video.summary: Two brothers are suspected of brutally murdering their parents.
Video.title: Bad Blood

Video.summary: Chris and Rita confront a bizarre burglary ring involving the mob, murder and Chris' quirky snitch Dunn.
Video.title: Hot Rocks
